settings.caption: Elevate Your Routine
settings.heading: Your signature scents, always in stock.
settings.text: The Candles By Victoria Candle Club makes managing your home fragrance entirely effortless. Save on every order, discover new artisan scents, and enjoy premium handcrafted candles delivered exactly on your schedule.

settings.caption: Membership Perks
settings.title: Why join the Candle Club.
settings.text_1: Unlock preferred pricing automatically on every recurring delivery of your favorite custom candles and wax melts.
settings.text_2: Keep your home beautifully stocked. From comforting everyday staples to bold seasonal profiles, you dictate the supply.
settings.text_3: Choose a delivery cadence that actually fits your routine. Our subscriptions are designed for real life, not rigid corporate plans.
settings.text_4: With our massive fragrance library, you can explore new aromas over time, swapping out scents whenever the mood strikes.

settings.caption: How It Works
settings.title: A seamless, three-step experience.
settings.text_1: Select custom candles, standard pours, or wax melts from the collections you already know and love.
settings.text_2: Pick a delivery interval that works perfectly for your home and how frequently you burn your candles.
settings.text_3: We handcraft your selections to order and ship them so they arrive on your doorstep exactly when you need them.

settings.heading: Total control. Zero friction.
settings.text: We built the Candle Club for flexibility. Pause, skip a month, swap your scents, or cancel your shipments at any time directly from your customer account in just a few clicks.

settings.caption: Start Your Subscription
settings.heading: Bring premium fragrance home, on repeat.
